labels: new-template

## Chart Name / 图表名称

<!-- English name (Chinese name) — e.g. Bump Chart (排名变化图) -->

## Category / 类目

<!-- Which directory? charts/ | maps/ | graphs/ | 3d/ -->

- [ ] `charts/` — statistical charts / 统计图表
- [ ] `maps/` — geographic / 地理地图
- [ ] `graphs/` — relational & hierarchical / 关系与层次
- [ ] `3d/` — three-dimensional / 三维

## Use Cases / 适用场景

<!-- When should this chart be chosen? What data shape and intent does it serve?
     Include suggested ranges (number of categories, data points). -->

## Data Format / 数据格式

<!-- A minimal JSON example of the input data this chart consumes. -->

```json

```

## Why It's Distinct / 为何需要单独模板

<!-- How does this differ from existing templates? Could it instead be a "variant"
     of an existing chart? See the Variants section of related templates. -->

## Reference Implementations / 参考实现

<!-- Links to good examples (Observable, ECharts gallery, D3 examples, papers).
     Note any accessibility considerations (colorblind safety, redundant encoding). -->

## Checklist / 提交前确认

- [ ] I checked existing templates and variants for overlap / 已检查是否与现有模板或变体重复
- [ ] I can describe the five required sections (see `templates/TEMPLATE-SPEC.md`)
      / 我能描述五个必需章节
